title: Telemarketer
description:
Telemarketer (Full Time)

Job Title: Telemarketer (Full-Time)

Location: 371 Alexandra Road #12-23 Singapore 159963
Working Hours: Monday to Friday | 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM

About Us:
At SJ Group, we are committed to delivering quality products and services to our clients. As we continue to grow, we are seeking a detail-oriented and motivated Telemarketer to join our team. If you're looking for a role where you can make a tangible impact and develop your professional skills, we’d love to hear from you.

Job Overview:
As a Telemarketer, your primary responsibility will be to connect with potential clients and schedule appointments for our Sales team. You’ll work closely with both prospective clients and our internal team to ensure smooth communication and follow-through.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Reach out to potential clients using leads provided.
  • Schedule appointments for interested clients with the Sales team.
  • Maintain a positive, professional tone on every call.
  • Stay informed about our offerings to effectively answer any client questions.
  • Collaborate with the Sales team to ensure a seamless transition from initial contact to appointment.

Skills & Qualifications:

  • Fluent in English with strong communication skills.
  • Excellent listening skills and attention to detail.
  • Polite and professional phone etiquette.
  • Ability to persuade and engage with potential clients in a positive manner.
  • Previous telemarketing, customer service, or sales experience is an advantage, but not required.
  • Ability to work independently and meet goals.

2.

postedCompany.description:
At SJ Group Advisors, our core commitment is to always put the interests of our clients and associates first. We firmly believe that by prioritizing their needs, we can build strong and lasting relationships that form the foundation of our success. 


Our dedicated team takes the time to listen, understand, and guide them through their financial journey, ensuring transparency, trust, and integrity in every interaction. By placing the interests of our clients and associates first, we create a culture of trust, accountability, and shared success. It is this commitment that drives us to continually innovate and provide unparalleled financial advisory services.


SJ Group has definitely evolved along the years! Kindly find out more about us in our Instagram page in the link provided.
